# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

add_subdirectory(deps)

add_executable(unittester-library-profiling)


target_compile_options(unittester-library-profiling PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(unittester-library-profiling PUBLIC
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  build-cow-on
  cpp-testing-gtest
  cpp-testing-gtest_main
  cpp-json-yson
  yt-core-test_framework
  yt-library-profiling
  library-profiling-solomon
  library-profiling-tcmalloc
  library-profiling-resource_tracker
  library-profiling-perf
)

target_allocator(unittester-library-profiling
  system_allocator
)

target_link_options(unittester-library-profiling PRIVATE
  -Wl,-platform_version,macos,11.0,11.0
  -fPIC
  -fPIC
  -framework
  CoreFoundation
)

target_sources(unittester-library-profiling PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/per_cpu_sensor_impl_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/simple_sensor_impl_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/sensor_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/sensor_service_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/name_conflicts_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/profiler_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/solomon_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/summary_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/tag_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/cube_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/encoder_ut.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/library/profiling/unittests/exporter_ut.cpp
)


add_test(
  NAME
  unittester-library-profiling
  COMMAND
  unittester-library-profiling
)

set_property(
  TEST
  unittester-library-profiling
  PROPERTY
  LABELS
  MEDIUM
)

set_property(
  TEST
  unittester-library-profiling
  PROPERTY
  ENVIRONMENT
)

vcs_info(unittester-library-profiling)

set_property(
  TEST
  unittester-library-profiling
  PROPERTY
  PROCESSORS
  1
)
